transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling, how can I help?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Need someone to clean before we move in next Saturday

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Absolutely. What's the size of the place and are you looking for a standard clean or a deep clean?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: 3 bed 2 bath, deep clean. And we have a dog.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it — for a move-in deep clean at 3/2 with a pet, we bring pet-safe supplies. That comes to around $340. Saturday morning works?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling, how can I help?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Do you clean short-term rentals? I have three Airbnbs.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: We do standard residential cleaning. I'm not sure about short-term rental turnovers — let me connect you with a dispatcher.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Never mind, I'll try someone else.
